title: Secret Agent Expense Report
text:
## Secret Agent Expense Report

Agent {person} requests reimbursement for a {adjective} mission in {place}.

Expenses include {number} disguises, one {color} {vehicle}, and emergency {food} for a suspicious {animal}.

The agent had to {verb} through a vent while {verb ending in -ing} {adverb} with the stolen {object}.

Additional charges: replacement {clothing item}, fake {body part}, and {plural noun} for the getaway.

Mission outcome: target {past-tense verb}; agent felt {emotion} and {adjective}.
